mapper.insert: INSERT INTO members ( name, email, password, status, points, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{email}, #{password}, #{status}, #{points}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, email, password, status, points, created_at, updated_at FROM members ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, name, email, password, status, points, created_at, updated_at FROM members WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, email, password, status, points, created_at, updated_at FROM members WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE members SET points = #{points}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() WHERE id = #{id}
